releases.summary: Move update buttons into hours stats bar
changes: Moved Perform Manual Update and Generate AI Update buttons into the hours stats bar
Hours on the left, action buttons on the right within the same card

releases.summary: Collapsible update form with separate Manual and AI update buttons
changes: Replaced 'Add Update' form with two action buttons: Perform Manual Update and Generate AI Update
Manual update form hidden by default, toggles open on click with Cancel to close
Generate AI Update button now at top level alongside Manual Update button

releases.summary: Fix AI update button: add apikey header for Supabase gateway
changes: Added apikey header to Edge Function fetch request
Improved error messages to show server-side details

releases.summary: AI-powered project status updates via one-click button
changes: Added 'Generate AI Update' button on project detail page (purple, matches Claude branding)
Supabase Edge Function reads GitHub repo commits and docs, calls Anthropic API to compose update
Auto-estimates hours worked from commit timestamps and volume
Extracts tools, version, and release notes from repo data
Updates appear in timeline with existing purple dot and '(via Claude)' label
Button only appears for projects with a github_repo configured
Added github_repo column to projects table

releases.summary: Retire old ideas page, redirect to dashboard
changes: ideas.html now redirects to dashboard.html
Removed old idea-detail.html, ideas.js, idea-detail.js, and ideas.css

releases.summary: Hours tracking on project updates with stats bar
changes: Added numeric hours field to project updates (replaces free-text time input)
Project detail page shows Total / Today / This Week hours stats bar
Hours aggregation calculated from all updates on the project
Database: added hours NUMERIC column to updates table

releases.summary: Compact spacing across all public site pages
changes: Reduced spacing variables: --space-lg from 2rem to 1.25rem, --space-xl from 3rem to 2rem, --space-2xl from 4rem to 2.5rem, --space-3xl from 6rem to 3.5rem
Tighter hero section, section headers, card icons, and footer padding
Desktop breakpoint sections use --space-2xl instead of --space-3xl
Applies to all public pages: Home, Services, Case Studies, About, Contact

releases.summary: Clickable version badge opens release notes
changes: Click version number next to TAKGIO to view full release history
Release notes modal shows version, date, summary, and change list for each release

releases.summary: Dark theme overhaul and clickable column sorting
changes: Dark theme rebuilt to Material Design standard (WCAG AA contrast ratios)
CSS custom properties override in dark mode so entire page inherits consistently
Proper dark surfaces (#121212 bg, #1E1E1E cards, #252525 inputs)
High-emphasis text at 87% white, medium at 60%, disabled at 38%
Desaturated accent color (#6B8AFF) for dark mode readability
Clickable column headers with ascending/descending sort arrows
Custom dark scrollbar styling
Replaced Ideas page with full project lifecycle dashboard
Supabase Auth login (individual accounts for Ted, Ritchie, Steve)
Dashboard with sortable project list, clickable column headers, doughnut chart, overview stats
Project detail pages with timeline, updates, tasks, and stage transitions
My Tasks page for personal task queue across projects
Six lifecycle stages: Idea, Active, Paused, Completed, Live, Discarded
Staleness detection for Active projects (14+ days without update)
Vivid/Dark theme toggle
Strategy doc and database schema in docs/
